About Me

Dev. AI Builder. Results Driven.

I'm Qazi Raheel Ahmed — I build AI-powered websites that actually work for your business, not just look good.

With 2 years of real-world experience across e-commerce, media platforms, restaurants, and digital agencies — I bring developer skills combined with business thinking. Every site I build is fast, SEO-optimized, and built to convert.

I work with international clients across UAE, UK, USA, Canada, and Europe — delivering scalable, modern web solutions that compete on a global level.

AI-Powered Workflow

OpenAI and automation in every project — making your site smarter than the competition.

Business-First Code

Every feature answers one question: does this make you money or save you time?

03

Scalable Architecture

Built to grow from 100 to 100,000 users without breaking a sweat.

04

SEO From Day One

Technical SEO baked in at architecture level — not an afterthought.

How I Work

7-Step Process. Zero Surprises.

01

Discovery

Deep dive into your goals, audience, and technical requirements.

02

Planning

Architecture, tech stack, timeline, and milestones. No surprises.

03

UI/UX Design

Wireframes crafted for conversion before a single line of code.

04

Development

Clean, documented code built for scale. Regular updates throughout.

05

Testing

Cross-browser, cross-device, SEO, and performance testing.

06

Deployment

Zero-downtime launch with full SSL and CDN configuration.

07

Support

Ongoing technical support and optimization post-launch.

Mobile UX issues on [specific section] These are all fixable — and the impact on traffic is usually significant within 60–90 days. I specialize in Full Stack Development + SEO.
